problems.problem: ChatScreen.swift is 7060 lines - massive god object violating single responsibility principle. Contains 48+ @State variables, 40+ nested structs, impossible to maintain.
problems.impact: Unmaintainable, high cognitive load, difficult to test, prone to merge conflicts.
problems.recommendation: Extract into: ChatViewModel, MessageListView, InputAreaView, ToolbarView, SidebarView. Use composition over monolithic view.

problems.problem: 48 @State variables in single View - SwiftUI recomposes entire view on any state change, causing performance degradation.
problems.impact: Lag during typing, stuttering animations, unnecessary re-renders.
problems.recommendation: Migrate to Observable ViewModels (iOS 17+): @StateObject ChatViewModel with internal state partitioning.

problems.problem: 1849 lines sidebar - too complex, mixes concerns: thread list, search, filtering, tags, folders, import/export, network timeline.
problems.impact: Hard to add features, test, or fix bugs in sidebar.
problems.recommendation: Extract: ThreadListView, ThreadFiltersView, ThreadSearchView, ThreadActionsView as separate components.

problems.problem: Limited keyboard shortcuts - only Escape key for multi-select exit. No arrow key navigation, no Cmd+[] for thread navigation, no keyboard shortcuts for common actions.
problems.impact: Power users frustrated, forced to use mouse for everything.
problems.recommendation: Add: Cmd+[/] thread nav, Cmd+K command palette (exists but underutilized), arrow key list navigation, Tab/Shift+Tab between input fields.

problems.problem: MessageRow is complex (1000+ lines), handles: display, editing, diff view, hover actions, context menus, selection, search highlighting - too many responsibilities.
problems.impact: Slow message rendering, hard to customize message appearance.

problems.problem: Input history (historyIndex) only has up/down navigation. No full undo/redo stack for editing messages or reverting changes.
problems.impact: Cannot undo accidental message edits or deletions.
problems.recommendation: Implement proper UndoManager integration or custom undo stack for message edits, deletions, and state changes.

problems.problem: No keyboard navigation for thread list. Cannot use arrow keys to browse threads, Enter to open.
problems.recommendation: Add @FocusState to list, implement arrow key navigation, Enter key to select thread.

problems.problem: 1214 lines custom markdown renderer - reinventing wheel. Could use upstream library or simplify.
problems.recommendation: Consider using MarkdownUI library or extracting to separate package with tests.

problems.problem: Voice input state scattered: speechRecognizer, audioEngine, recognitionRequest, recognitionTask - not encapsulated.
Only 3 @FocusState variables (focused, isFocused) for entire complex UI - insufficient focus management.
problems.impact: Tab navigation doesn't work properly, focus jumps unexpectedly.
problems.recommendation: Add @FocusState for: searchInput, messageInput, sidebarSearch, commandPalette.

positive_findings: Command Palette (Cmd+K) exists with fuzzy search - good UX pattern
ShortcutsOverlay (Cmd+/) shows available keyboard shortcuts - excellent discoverability
Multi-select mode with floating action bar - good UX for bulk operations
Keyboard shortcuts documented in ShortcutsOverlay with clear grouping
